title: Costumes Rebuilt
description: A Palladium addon to get costumes
body:
### ❌ Incompatible with Optifine use Embeddium/Rubidium instead.
## 📒 Introduction
You want something to wear while having your Favourite Powers? Then Install **Costumes Rebuilt!**
## ❓ What is Costumes Rebuilt?
Costumes Rebuilt is an Addon to [ThreeTAG's Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium) mod for both Fabric and Forge.
This addon adds many Suits from Comics, Movies and TV Shows!
There are Theme-based Updates so you can enjoy it more!
## ❓ How to get Suits?
In 1.1 you can craft Random Suit Scrolls and right click them to get a random suit scroll. For the New Suits, craft them in a smithing table using a scroll, a base armor piece and a symbiote. (Check the Gallery for more)
## 📃 What Suits are there currently in the Addon?

Known Characters like **Spiderman**, **Captain America**, **Batman**, **Superman** and some different Characters like **Ambush Bug**, **Hunter's Moon**
#### And A Lot More!

</details>

## ⚙️ More
You can join the **[Discord](https://discord.gg/EXhxMVh3um)**.

#### Also Check-out [Potato Heroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/potato-heroes)!
